concerns.text: FR-008 requires a sensitivity analysis sweeping clustering coefficient thresholds. T035b implements a 'sensitivity sweep' but lacks explicit linkage to FR-008 or the requirement to 'report how diffusion rates vary' across the sweep. The task description focuses on schema and cutoffs (SC-005) but misses the core FR-008 deliverable of correlating the sweep results with diffusion rates.

The 'Disconnected Networks' edge case mandates a 10-attempt retry logic. T018b already implements this logic. T051 is a redundant task ('Refactor... to strictly enforce') that duplicates the requirement without adding new coverage, creating ambiguity on which task satisfies the spec. A single, clear task is needed to cover this edge case.

FR-007 requires documenting random seeds in a reproducible configuration file. T004c (Create config.yaml) is marked incomplete (`- [ ]`). Without this task completion, the foundational artifact for FR-007 and downstream tasks (T004b, T016a) is missing, leaving the requirement unmet.

The 'SimulationRun' entity (Key Entities) and FR-002/FR-003 require capturing simulation results. T029a (Schema) and T029 (Serialization) are marked incomplete. No other task covers the implementation of the `SimulationRun` data contract or the serialization of diffusion rates, leaving the core output of US-2 uncovered.

SC-003 requires measuring statistical power against a design target. T044 (Implement statistical power analysis) is marked incomplete. No other task covers the calculation of achieved power or the generation of the `power_analysis_report.json`, leaving SC-003 unverified.

ROC-001 mandates that findings be framed as associational. T038 generates the report, but T038a (Verify report) is marked incomplete. Without T038a, there is no task to verify that the generated report actually adheres to the associational constraint, leaving the constraint unverified.

T051 references 'Edge Cases' and 'spec' but does not explicitly tag the specific Edge Case ID or FR-001/FR-002 it satisfies, making traceability ambiguous compared to other tasks that use `[US#]` or explicit FR references.
